name: aif_edit_content_type
description: This function is used to edit a content type. Do not return values that are not changed.

data_name.name: data_name
data_name.description: Data Name The required node type data name to edit. Allows for underscore and alphanumeric characters.

label.name: label
label.description: Etiqueta The node type label, if you want to update it.

description.name: description
description.description: Descripció The node type description, if you want to update it.

new_revision.name: new_revision
new_revision.description: New Revision Whether new revisions are enabled or not, if you want to update it.

preview_mode.name: preview_mode
preview_mode.description: Preview Mode Whether preview mode is enabled or not. 0 is disabled, 2 is required, 1 is optional.

display_submitted.name: display_submitted
display_submitted.description: Display Submitted Whether we display author and publish date or not. Only set if you want to update it.

published_by_default.name: published_by_default
published_by_default.description: Published By Default Whether the node is published by default. Only set if you want to update it.

promoted_by_default.name: promoted_by_default
promoted_by_default.description: Promoted By Default Whether the node is promoted to front page by default. Only set if you want to update it.

sticky_by_default.name: sticky_by_default
sticky_by_default.description: Sticky By Default Whether the node is sticky by default. Only set if you want to update it.

parent.name: parent
parent.description: Pare If the vocabulary is hierarchical, the id of the parent term.

weight.name: weight

term_language.name: term_language
term_language.description: Term Language The language of the term. Only set if you know/want to set it.

name: aif_field_type_agent
description: This is capable of adding, editing, informing, reordering or removing a field types to an existing Drupal entity type/bundles, lookup fields existing on entities and also change the form display and view display of the fields. Note that this does not generate entity type or bundles.

prompt.name: prompt
prompt.description: Prompt The prompt in natural language on how to invoke this agent.

files.name: files
files.description: Fitxers The files using file id.

name: aif_node_content_type_agent
description: This is capable of adding, editing, informing or removing basic information on a Drupal node type/content type and also answer questions about node types. This is your main agent to generate new content types. This does not add path or field information. Note: This agent can not create or edit nodes, as in content. Also note that it doesn't create a body field, you need to add that yourself or via the field agent if that is what you want to do. It also can not work with the workflow module, just change settings on the node type.

prompt.name: prompt
prompt.description: Prompt The prompt in natural language on how to invoke this agent.

files.name: files
files.description: Fitxers The files using file id.

name: aif_taxonomy_agent
description: This agent is capable of creating new vocabularies, editing & renaming vocabularies and adding, editing or reordering taxonomy terms to vocabularies. Note that it does not setup taxonomy fields on other entities or answer question about fields on the vocabulary.

prompt.name: prompt
prompt.description: Prompt The prompt in natural language on how to invoke this agent.

files.name: files
files.description: Fitxers The files using file id.

name: aif_content_type_agent_triage
description: This is the initial agents for content type/node types, that can figure out if you are trying to create, edit, delete or ask questions about content types.

prompt.name: prompt
prompt.description: Prompt The prompt in natural language on how to invoke this agent.

files.name: files
files.description: Fitxers The files using file id.

name: aif_field_agent_triage
description: This is capable of adding, editing, informing, reordering or removing a field types to an existing Drupal entity type/bundles, lookup fields existing on entities and also change the form display and view display of the fields. Note that this does not generate entity type or bundles.

prompt.name: prompt
prompt.description: Prompt The prompt in natural language on how to invoke this agent.

files.description: Fitxers The files using file id.

name: aif_taxonomy_agent_config
description: The taxonomy agent can generate and edit vocabularies, as well as create and edit taxonomy terms. It can also answer questions, and give suggestions on what taxonomy terms to create from a general question. Please do ask it multiple instructions at once, it can handle it.

prompt.name: prompt
prompt.description: Prompt The prompt in natural language on how to invoke this agent.

files.name: files
files.description: Fitxers The files using file id.

name: jsonapi_jsonapi_read
description:
Retrieve entities via JSON:API. Supports filtering, pagination, and including related resources.
        If jsonapi_schema tool is available, use it to understand fields and relationships and only then use this tool.
        Only request necessary fields to optimize performance and reduce token usage.

uuid.description: UUID of specific entity (optional, omit for collection)

filters.description: JSON:API filters supporting full specification including operators, groups, and relationships

memberOf.description: Group ID this condition belongs to

include.description: Related resources to include (comma-separated field names)

sort.description: Sort order (e.g., "-created" for newest first, "title" for alphabetical)

fields.description: Sparse fieldsets: specify which fields to include for each resource type

additionalProperties.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include for this resource type

name: aia_field_type_agent__field_type_agent
description: This is capable of adding, editing, informing, reordering or removing a field types to an existing Drupal entity type/bundles, lookup fields existing on entities and also change the form display and view display of the fields. Note that this does not generate entity type or bundles.

prompt.description: The prompt to enable drupal modules or a question.

name: aia_node_content_type_agent__node_content_type_agent
description: This is capable of adding, editing, informing or removing basic information on a Drupal node type/content type and also answer questions about node types. This is your main agent to generate new content types. This does not add path or field information. Note: This agent can not create or edit nodes, as in content. Also note that it doesn't create a body field, you need to add that yourself or via the field agent if that is what you want to do. It also can not work with the workflow module, just change settings on the node type.

prompt.description: The prompt to enable drupal modules or a question.

name: aia_taxonomy_agent__taxonomy_agent
description: This agent is capable of creating new vocabularies, editing & renaming vocabularies and adding, editing or reordering taxonomy terms to vocabularies. Note that it does not setup taxonomy fields on other entities or answer question about fields on the vocabulary.

prompt.description: The prompt to enable drupal modules or a question.

name: aia_content_type_agent_triage__content_type_agent_triage
description: This is the initial agents for content type/node types, that can figure out if you are trying to create, edit, delete or ask questions about content types.

prompt.description: The prompt to enable drupal modules or a question.

name: aia_field_agent_triage__field_agent_triage
description: This is capable of adding, editing, informing, reordering or removing a field types to an existing Drupal entity type/bundles, lookup fields existing on entities and also change the form display and view display of the fields. Note that this does not generate entity type or bundles.

prompt.description: The prompt to enable drupal modules or a question.

name: aia_taxonomy_agent_config__taxonomy_agent_config
description: The taxonomy agent can generate and edit vocabularies, as well as create and edit taxonomy terms. It can also answer questions, and give suggestions on what taxonomy terms to create from a general question. Please do ask it multiple instructions at once, it can handle it.

prompt.description: The prompt to enable drupal modules or a question.
